channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Exclusive: A Children's Book Character Challenges the Left's Pro-Illegal Immigration Stance
item.description: As anti-ICE messaging spreads online and in schools, leftists teach children to vilify federal immigration enforcement agents.

item.title: Half of the Nation Joins Federal Initiative to Welcome Christians Back to Foster Parenting
item.description: The Trump administration is reversing Biden-era policies that excluded Christian families from foster care, reducing available homes for children.

item.title: Why Europe Cannot Quit Climate Alarmism
item.description: While America grows wealthier, Europe continues to pursue a failing climate strategy.

item.title: Trump Says Iran Did Not Inform Him of Withdrawal from Talks, but It Would Be 'Fine'
item.description: President Trump said Iran has not told him they want to leave peace negotiations over Israel's actions in Lebanon, but he said it is fine if they do.
